events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Cleveland Cavaliers

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 25 points, Jaylon Tyson had 20 and the Cleveland Cavaliers used a big third quarter to beat the Los Angeles Lakers 129-99 and spoil LeBron James' return to Northeast Ohio.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cavaliers spoil LeBron James' return, riding big 3rd quarter to 129-99 romp

headlines.description: — Mikal Bridges scored 19 of his 30 points in the third quarter, Karl-Anthony Towns had a season-high 22 rebounds and the New York Knicks extended their winning streak to four, rallying past the Toronto Raptors 119-92 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bridges scores 30, Towns has 22 rebounds as Knicks beat Raptors 119-92 for 4th straight win
